mapper.select: /* PoDaysObQtyMapper.xml insertPoDaysObQty */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_ORDER_STAT ( OWKEY , CTKEY , CRITDAY , ICKEY , QTY , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT H.OWKEY AS OWKEY, H.CTKEY AS CTKEY, H.ORDERISTDAY AS CRITDAY, D.ICKEY AS ICKEY, SUM(D.EXPCTQTY) AS QTY, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS INSERTDATE, 'BATCH' AS INSERTURKEY, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS UPDATEDATE, 'BATCH' AS UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD H JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT D ON D.OWKEY = H.OWKEY AND D.SOHDKEY = H.SOHDKEY WHERE H.ORDERISTDAY BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_MST_ORTYPE T WHERE T.OWKEY = H.OWKEY AND T.ORDERTYPECD = H.ORDERTYPECD AND T.STATYN = 'Y' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_MST_OW O WHERE O.OWKEY = H.OWKEY ) GROUP BY H.OWKEY, H.CTKEY, D.ICKEY, H.ORDERISTDAY HAVING SUM(D.EXPCTQTY) > 0
